SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT W/STEVEN LITTMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. REGINA CELESTE COE PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEFS. JAMES POLLICK & THEODORE POLLICK NOT PRESENT DEFAULTS PREVIOUSLY HAVING BEEN ENTERED. CASE SETTLED AS TO MS. COE WITH JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 136 RAY ST, S.F, CA. - FORFEITURE OF LEASE AGREEMENT - $1,500 RENT & DAMAGES - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVIC- TION STAYED TO 1-11-94, 5PM - PL. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & ATTY. FEES - UPON VACATING & PMT, PL. WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLLICK, JAMES L. POLLICK, THEODORE W. COE, REGINA CELESTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 136 RAE AVE, S.F, CA. $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-11-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. DEFAULTS OF JAMES L POLLICK & THEODORE W. POLLICK PREVIOUSLY ENTERED, BUT ARE INCLUDED IN THIS JUDGMENT. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
